scenarios.name: email and phone are masked for child members but visible to adults

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_member_directory__directory_people (id, name, kind, visibility, email, phone, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'other', 'everyone', ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT name, email, phone FROM app_member_directory__directory_people WHERE id = ?

UPDATE app_member_directory__directory_people SET name = 'tampered' WHERE id = ?
